readings.summary: Share with those in need and you will be rewarded.

readings.citation:
Ps 112:4-5, 6-7, 8-9, R. v.4a
The just man is a light in darkness to the upright.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 112:4-5, 6-7, 8-9, R. v.4a
The just man is a light in darkness to the upright.

readings.summary: Faith is a gift from God.

I am the light of the world, says the Lord;
whoever follows me will have the light of life.
Salt of the earth, light of the world.

antiphons.text:
O come, let us worship God
and bow low before the God who made us,
for he is the Lord our God.

Let them thank the Lord for his mercy,
his wonders for the children of men,
for he satisfies the thirsty soul,
and the hungry he fills with good things.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Mt 5:5–6
antiphons.text:
Blessed are those who mourn, for they shall be consoled.
Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness,
for they shall have their fill.
